# uptimekuma_notification_onechat (Resource)

OneChat notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_onechat" "example" {
  name         = "OneChat Notifications"
  access_token = "your-access-token"
  receiver_id  = "user123"
  bot_id       = "bot-001"
  is_active    = true
  is_default   = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive) Access token for authentication with the OneChat API.
- `bot_id` (String) Bot ID for sending messages through OneChat.
- `name` (String) Notification name
- `receiver_id` (String) Recipient ID (user or group ID) in OneChat.

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
